title: Luxury Scented Candle – Warm Apple & Cinnamon - 18 Oz Jar with lid - up to 95 Hour Burn Time – (by Wickford & Co)
features: Warm Apple & Cinnamon- fill your home with a beautiful lasting scent, and create a cosy, warm and relaxing environment on a cold winter's evening or maybe just a nice pleasant aroma on a summers evening after a hot exhausting day.

Candle comes in a Glass Jar with Lid- the perfect easy to use candle, treat yourself or buy it as a gift. It comes in its own container which makes the candle convenient and simple to use and stops unwanted wax dripping onto surfaces. Only want to smell the candle when it's burning? No problem just re-place the lid, when you don't want the scent to fill the room. The glass container makes it ideal for use indoors or outdoors too.
Up to 95 Hour Burn Time - this long-lasting candle will provide your home with a scent throughout the house, depending on how often you light it of course!
18 ounces jar, that when you are finished using it, you can just extinguish and replace the lid until you next use it.
description: Product Description Warm Apple & Cinnamon Warm Apple & Cinnamon Scent - fill your home with a festive scent this Christmas, getting into the spirit of the holiday period and helping to create a cosy, warm and relaxing environment on a cold winter's evening. Candle comes in a Glass Jar with Lid- the perfect easy to use gift for yourself or others this Christmas or birthday. It comes in its own container which makes the candle convenient and simple to use and stops unwanted wax dripping onto surfaces. Only want to smell the candle when it's burning? No problem just pop, the lid on when you don't want the scent to fill the room. The glass container makes it ideal for use indoors or outdoors too. Up to 95 Hour Burn Time - this long-lasting candle will provide your home with a Christmas scent throughout the festive season, depending on how often you light it of course! 18 ounces Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave unattended. Extinguish before leaving the room or going to sleep. Dispose of candle and container properly.
